title: phalangium eccremorrhizum
intro: Phalangium eccremorrhizum, also known as the Sikkim staff tree, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Phalangium eccremorrhizum are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
